<!--
Thanks for contributing to OPI. Please fill in each section below.
Review CONTRIBUTING.md if you have not already.
-->

## Summary

Briefly describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Change class

- [ ] Editorial (typos, formatting, clarifications, broken links, non-normative example fixes)
- [ ] Substantive (changes to normative requirements, URIs, JSON structures, or security/privacy assertions)

If this is a substantive change, a tracking issue is required and the 7-day public comment window must have opened on that issue before this pull request can be merged.

## Linked issues

Reference any related issues. For substantive changes, link the tracking issue.

- Closes #
- Related to #

## Specifications affected

- [ ] OPI-EPS (Extensible Preference Schema)
- [ ] OPI-PD (Preference Discoverability)
- [ ] OPI-TRUST (Trust Registry)
- [ ] Other (governance, contributing, tooling, and similar)

## Review checklist

- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md.
- [ ] The change is scoped to one logical topic (editorial PRs may bundle typo fixes).
- [ ] Normative keywords (MUST, MUST NOT, SHOULD, SHOULD NOT, MAY, REQUIRED, OPTIONAL) are in all capitals where normative, lowercase where not.
- [ ] Cross-references to RFCs, W3C documents, and other external standards use bracketed short names and appear in the References section.
- [ ] Examples are marked non-normative.
- [ ] Prose contains no em-dash characters (U+2014).
- [ ] "requestor" is spelled consistently (not "requester").

## Notes for reviewers

Anything you want reviewers to pay special attention to, known open questions, or follow-up work you plan to file separately. (Optional.)
